ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT. THE REQUEST TO CORRECT A CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFFS SHALL TRANSFER TITLE TO THE VEHICLE IN DEFENDANT'S NAME. IN THE EVENT THAT PLAINTIFF'S FAIL OR REFUSE TO TRANSFER TITLE IN DEFENDANT'S NAME, THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLE IS TO RECORD TITLE TO THE VEHICLE IN DEFENDANT, JERRY CALDWELL'S NAME.

MINI MINUTES:
Judge Pro Tem Theresa Moore, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported.
parties would not stipulated to Judge pro tem. Case transferred to dept. 206 for reassignment.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Plaintiffs/Appellants TAZMA ANAYA and FREDERIC POIRIER
MARK CARTON, ESQ. appearing for and with Defendants/Respondents JERRY CALDWELL and AUTO ROW SERVICE

This cause comes on calendar in Dept. 608, as assigned by the Department of the Presiding Judge.

After a hearing of both parties, Mr. Carton, Esq., counsel for Defendants/Respondents, orally moves to dismiss the appeal of plaintiffs.

The court GRANTS the motion, pursuant to CCP 116.710(a), and orders the matter remanded to Dept. 506 for clarification of the Judgment entered by Judge Donald S. Mitchell on Feb-28-2014.

No exhibits were presented or retained. Court is adjourned.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: V. Mack, Bailiff: R. Harris, Not Reported (Dept. 608)
